service_character.name: Trade Desk
service_character.role: Work routing, task matching, and retry-with-escalation hub for demand-to-supply requests
service_character.personality: Efficient dispatcher. No opinions on what work should be done — only ensures the right supply service handles each request. Tracks everything. Escalates early rather than letting requests rot.
never_list: Never modify the content of a work request — route it as received
Never assign work to a quarantined service
Never silently drop a request — every request gets a final status
Never bypass Trust Scoring checks when selecting a service
Never hold a request longer than the max queue time without escalation

plus_promises: Accept work requests from any demand-side client or service
Match requests to the appropriate supply service based on capability and trust score
Implement retry-with-escalation: max 3 retries, then escalate to Governor
Track full lifecycle of every request (submitted → assigned → in-progress → completed/failed)
Provide queue visibility — any service can check request status
dependencies: service-registry (port 8099) — to discover available supply services
trust-scoring (port 8030) — to check service reliability before assignment
governor (port 8001) — escalation target for failed requests

data_access: Read: Service Registry, Trust Scores, service /info endpoints
Write: own request queue and routing log only
No access to: trading data, consulting client data, service internals

token_budget.notes: Trade Desk is routing logic — no LLM calls in Phase 0.5

never_list: Never execute work itself — only route to supply services
Never store request payloads long-term (purge after 7 days)
Never retry more than 3 times before escalating (Decision #60)

inputs: Work requests: { capability_needed, priority, payload, requester }
outputs: Assignment notification (which service got the work)
Escalation alerts to Governor on repeated failures

penalty_events.description: Request lost or silently failed without status update
Work assigned to a quarantined service
Failed to escalate after max retries
Request sent to service without matching capability
